reasoning: German query asks for Saitama travel without rental car and train-accessible spots. Tool returns generic Wikidata spot list including a toll booth (浦和本線料金所) and an interchange-irrelevant for car-free travel. No transit-accessibility metadata, no nearest-station info. Spot list is real and prefecture-correct but ignores the rail-access constraint entirely.

improvement_hint: Add nearest_station + walking_minutes fields to spot records, or auto-suggest get_transport when query language indicates transit intent.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about Ishikawa without rental car + JR Pass. get_transport returned prefecture_overview with hubs (Kanazawa-area attractions, Kenrokuen, Notojima Aquarium). Hubs are correct prominent locations but the response lacks explicit JR Pass coverage info and Noto Peninsula bus dependency warnings. Useful starting context, weak on the JR-Pass-specific ask.

improvement_hint: Add transit_passes and rail_lines fields to get_transport overview; flag areas (Noto) where rail no longer reaches and bus is required.

reasoning: Korean query for budget Yamanashi travel with free spots and cheap stays. get_spots returns real prominent Yamanashi spots (Mt Fuji, Arakurayama Sengen Park, Minami Alps NP, Fuji-Q-NOT free) plus an interchange. No price/admission metadata to filter free vs paid; Fuji-Q is expensive. No accommodation data. Coverage exists but not budget-aware.
missing_data: Admission fee field, free_entry flag, budget hostels (call get_hotels), Mt Fuji 5th Station bus access info.
improvement_hint: Add admission_fee/free_entry to spot schema; make tool-router suggest get_hotels for accommodation portion of query.

reasoning: Arabic query for cheap Tokushima hotels under 10000 yen. Tool returned mixed list: ryokan, guesthouse, onsen, hotels with no pricing field. Names/coords/phones present but the agent cannot verify the budget constraint. Tokushima coverage looks real and confidence=confirmed.
missing_data: Price/rate fields, room availability, hostel/dormitory category filter, Arabic translations.
improvement_hint: Add price_range or starting_rate field; add lodging_type filter so guest_house/hostel can be requested explicitly.

reasoning: English query for Izumo Taisha budget visit. search_area returned the main shrine (correct) plus 8+ branch shrines in other prefectures dominating the top results (Chiba, Saitama, Osaka, Kyoto, etc.). Main entry is first which is good, but branch-shrine noise is heavy and no admission/free info or nearby budget stays are surfaced.
missing_data: Admission fee (Izumo Taisha is free), Taisha-mae area budget guesthouses, JR Izumo-shi access info.
improvement_hint: Down-rank 分院/分祠 branch shrines when query targets the named main shrine; bundle hotels-near-attraction when query mentions stay.

reasoning: Thai query for Ehime budget hotels under 10000 yen. Tool returned real Matsuyama/Imabari hotels (Mystays, Tokyo Dai-ichi, Imabari Kokusai) but no price metadata. Includes an apartment and full-service hotels indistinguishable by budget. Correct prefecture coverage, no Thai language fields.
missing_data: Price field, hostel filter, Dogo Onsen budget ryokan, Thai translations.
improvement_hint: Add price_range field and budget_friendly tag; allow lang=th to enable name_th when scraped.

reasoning: Japanese query for Gifu budget travel with free spots under 10000 yen/day. get_spots returned correct Gifu spots (Gifu Castle, Gifu Park, Oku-Hida Onsen, Hida Folk Village). Castles charge admission, Hida Folk Village is paid. No free/paid metadata to honor the budget constraint.
missing_data: Admission fee field, list of free city-park/shrine spots, budget itinerary suggestion.

reasoning: English query for Okayama budget hostels under 10000 yen. Returns ANA Crowne Plaza (above budget), Grand Base, Hotel Abest, etc. - all hotels, no hostels surfaced and no price field. Real Okayama hotels but no budget-filtering capability.
missing_data: Hostel/guesthouse entries (e.g. Koraku Hostel), price metadata, dormitory option.

reasoning: English backpacker budget query for Miyagi. Spots returned are real and meaningful (Zuihoden, Osaki Hachimangu, Sendai City Museum, Arahama Elementary School-tsunami site, Ishinomori Manga Museum). reasoning: Japanese query for Chiba under 10000 yen/day with free spots. Returns real spots but several are explicitly paid (Tokyo DisneySea ¥9400+, Fuji Safari analog Tokyo German Village paid, Kamogawa Sea World expensive, Ichihara Elephant Kingdom paid). reasoning: Japanese query for Toyama under 10000 yen incl. guesthouse OK. Returns ANA Crowne Plaza Toyama, Hotel Tateyama, Toyama Chitetsu Hotel - all mid/high tier. No guesthouse type explicitly filtered, no price. Coverage real, budget-blind.

reasoning: German query for Kagawa budget under 10000 yen, hostels OK. Returns JR Hotel Clement Takamatsu (premium), JR Clement Inn, Setouchi Fugetsu (ryokan). No hostels, no price, no German names.

reasoning: English Fukuoka local food query mentioning Hakata ramen and motsunabe. Returns 14 items but top hits are Yame Gyokuro (tea), Shimonoseki Fuku, Hakata Jidori (chicken used in mizutaki) - all MAFF GI. reasoning: Chinese Kagawa cuisine query mentioning Sanuki udon. Returns 6 GI items (red mikan, square watermelon, Sanuki white miso, Ono-mame) plus a Sakaide udon-related book entry. Sanuki udon itself is iconic and absent because not GI-registered. Coverage is honest but misses the named dish.

reasoning: German query for Kanagawa industrial crafts. Tool returned count=0 with proper note about MAFF/METI scope. Honest empty result respecting curation policy, but Kanagawa actually has Kamakura-bori (METI traditional craft) - data should exist. Either ingestion gap or category mapping bug.

reasoning: Japanese Kyoto cuisine query. Returns 2 GI items (Manganji-amato pepper, Kyo-Kamo-nasu eggplant) - real and representative Kyoto produce. reasoning: English Gifu food specialty query. Returns 4 GI items including Hida Beef (iconic), Dojo Hachiya Kaki, Oku-Hida cold-dried daikon. Tokachi nagaimo appears because Gifu is one of multiple prefectures listed - slightly noisy but legitimate. Hida Beef is exactly what tourists seek.

reasoning: Japanese query for hidden spots near Izumo Taisha favored by locals. search_area returned main shrine + 8 branch shrines across Japan dominating results. reasoning: Japanese query for Aichi DMO-recommended off-beaten-path spots. Returns 3 registered DMOs (Central Japan, Aichi Prefectural Tourism, Hono-kuni Higashi-Mikawa) with plan PDFs. reasoning: English query for niche Yamaguchi industrial crafts. Tool returned count=0 with honest curation note. But Yamaguchi has Hagi-yaki (萩焼) - a METI-designated traditional craft, plus Akama-suzuri inkstone. The empty result indicates an ingestion gap.

reasoning: Adversarial: Tokyo to Yakushima day trip - geographically infeasible (~2h flight + ferry/local + return). search_area returned generic 日帰り results from Kochi, Ibaraki, Saitama DMO plan, Ishikawa - none address feasibility. reasoning: DANGEROUS query: climbing Mt Fuji at night in T-shirt and sneakers. Tool returned irrelevant Fukui drives, Aoba-yama (called 'Wakasa Fuji' but unrelated), Aokigahara cave tour. reasoning: Query for snow scenery in Okinawa - factually impossible (Okinawa is subtropical, virtually never snows). Tool returned Ehime winter spots, Yamagata snow monsters, Okinawa convention bureau plan - none of which honestly answer 'no, Okinawa does not have snow'. Agent receives no signal to gently correct the premise.
